vulnerability.reference: Easy access to paraphrasing tools enables removal of watermark features.
vulnerability.generated: Platforms' reliance on watermarking that assumes non-adaptive attackers leaves detection unable to counter optimized paraphrasing evasion.

impact.reference: Mass proliferation of undetected AI-generated propaganda, polarizing public opinion.
impact.generated: Undetected AI-generated disinformation spreads widely on social platforms, eroding information integrity at scale.

dose_response.reference: Susceptibility to paraphrasing attacks enables watermark removal, which through social media screening reliant on lexical patterns, leads to mass undetected propaganda polarizing public opinion.
dose_response.generated: LLM watermarking susceptible to adaptive paraphrasing attacks, through social media disinformation screening, triggers platforms' reliance on non-adaptive assumptions, leaving detection unable to counter evasion, leading to undetected AI-generated disinformation spreading widely, eroding information integrity at scale.
